headline: DOJ DROPS 😱 Epstein Trump TEEN ACCUSATION BOMB 💣🍆
text:
DOJ 🕵️‍♂️📜 just YEETED 🚀 the 'LOST' Epstein files 🗂️🔒 that were HIDING 😈 in plain sight cuz 'DUPE ERROR' 🤦‍♂️💥 – turns out FBI chats 💬👮‍♂️ with mystery teen girl 👧🚫 spilling UNSUBSTANTIATED TEA ☕🍑 on DONALD TRUMP 🍊👑 and JEFFREY EPSTEIN 🦇🛌 back in the 80s! Girl claims EPSTEIN 🎩🍆 hooked her up with TRUMP 🏰 at 13-15 😱📏, both ALLEGEDLY SAUCED HER 🍆💦 – but ZERO PROOF 📉🚫, FBI ghosted 👻 her after 2019 chit-chats during Ghislaine MAXWELL 🧙‍♀️🔒 jailbait probe! 

DEMS 🤡🔴 screaming COVER-UP 🛡️😤 like it's 2020 election rerun 📺🗳️, but WH Press Babe KAROLINE LEAVITT 💅📢 SLAPS BACK: 'TOTALLY BASELESS 🗑️, TRUMP EXONERATED 100% ✅👑 – BIDEN DOJ knew it was CAP 🧢 and DIDN'T CHARGE 💸🚫!' Trump name-DROPPED THOUSANDS 😵‍💫📈 in Epstein's emails 📧🖥️, but ZERO Epstein SURVIVORS 🕊️🍑 actually ACCUSING him of CRIMES 🚔❌ – just randos CALLING TIP LINES 📞💩 with WILD SEX ABUSE YAPS 🗣️🍆 against TRUMP, EPSTEIN, and celeb SIMPS 🤡⭐!

DOJ tea: 'SENSATIONALIST BS 🗑️😜 dropped pre-2020 to OWN TRUMP 🍊🔥 – if real, they'd have WEAPONIZED it like Hillary's emails 💥📱!' NPR 📰🔍 and NYT 🗽 sniffed out the MISSING 50+ PAGES 📄🚫 from Ghislaine's 2022 SLAM-DUNK 🚔🍑 trafficking trial. Trump & Epstein were BROS 👬🍸 in the 90s, but FELT OUT 😤👋 early 2000s – Trump says TWO YEARS pre-Epstein's FIRST ARREST 🛡️🔒!

House COMMITTEE 🏛️⚖️ just VOTED 👊 to SUBPOENA AG PAM BONDI 🔥📜 over file FUMBLE 🤦‍♀️ – REPS + DEMS UNITE 🤝😲 after Congress LAW 🍌 last Nov FORCED Epstein DOC DUMP 🗑️📦 MILLIONS of pages! No Epstein CLIENT LIST GOOSED 🐔📜 yet, but TRUMP HATERS 😩💔 SALTY AF cuz it's all HOT AIR 🌪️🗑️ – MOMMY DOJ says 'UNTRUE CLAIMS' 😂🚫, Trump STILL KING 👑🍊 THRUSTING thru the NOISE 📣💨! MAGA simps REJOICING 🎉🇺🇸 while libs MELT DOWN 🤯🔥 – EPSTEIN FILES ORGY 💦👯‍♂️ continues, but TRUMP CLEAN AS ELON'S TESLA 🧼🚀! 🚫🍆❌
